requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence and National Conformity Context for Mauritania PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: 毛里塔尼亚光伏逆变器IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全证据及国家合格评定背景
requirement_topic.zht: 茅利塔尼亞光伏逆變器IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全證據及國家合格評定背景

summary.en: No public Mauritania solar-inverter product-safety rule equivalent to a dedicated IEC 62109 national regulation was confirmed in the reviewed sources. In practice, IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 are the bankable safety baseline for PV inverter procurement, especially for utility-scale, mini-grid, donor-financed, and SOMELEC-connected projects. Importers should also confirm whether a national conformity or quality procedure applies through Mauritania's standards/quality administration, commonly cited as the Direction de la Normalisation et de la Promotion de la Qualité (DNPQ) under the trade ministry, because that institutional route could not be independently confirmed from an official public page during this review.
summary.zh: 在已审查来源中，未能确认毛里塔尼亚存在相当于专门IEC 62109国家法规的公开太阳能逆变器产品安全规则。实务中，IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2是光伏逆变器采购的可融资安全基准，尤其适用于公用事业规模、微网、捐助方融资及SOMELEC接入项目。进口商还应确认是否通过毛里塔尼亚标准/质量主管部门适用国家合格评定或质量程序，该机构常被称为贸易部下属Direction de la Normalisation et de la Promotion de la Qualité（DNPQ），但本次审查未能从官方公开网页独立确认该机构路径。
summary.zht: 在已審查來源中，未能確認茅利塔尼亞存在相當於專門IEC 62109國家法規的公開太陽能逆變器產品安全規則。實務中，IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2是光伏逆變器採購的可融資安全基準，尤其適用於公用事業規模、微網、捐助方融資及SOMELEC接入項目。進口商還應確認是否通過茅利塔尼亞標準/品質主管部門適用國家合格評定或品質程序，該機構常被稱為貿易部下屬Direction de la Normalisation et de la Promotion de la Qualité（DNPQ），但本次審查未能從官方公開網頁獨立確認該機構路徑。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
Mauritania national conformity or quality procedure through the standards/quality administration, commonly cited as DNPQ — unconfirmed; verify locally
SOMELEC, ARE, tender, EPC, and lender safety-documentation requirements — project-specific

summary.en: China-side safety evidence commonly includes GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, CQC/CGC voluntary certificates, CB reports where available, and factory production-control documents. GB/T 37408 and NB/T 32004 are useful domestic baselines, but they should not be represented as IEC 62109-1/-2 certificates unless the reports explicitly cover the IEC standards, the model family, firmware/hardware variants, environmental ratings, and production sites relevant to the Mauritania project.
summary.zh: 中国侧安全证据通常包括GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004、CQC/CGC自愿性证书、可用时的CB报告以及工厂生产控制文件。GB/T 37408和NB/T 32004是有用的国内基准，但除非报告明确覆盖IEC标准、型号系列、硬件/固件变体、环境等级及与毛里塔尼亚项目相关的生产场所，不应将其表述为IEC 62109-1/-2证书。
summary.zht: 中國側安全證據通常包括GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004、CQC/CGC自願性證書、可用時的CB報告以及工廠生產控制文件。GB/T 37408和NB/T 32004是有用的國內基準，但除非報告明確覆蓋IEC標準、型號系列、硬體/韌體變體、環境等級及與茅利塔尼亞項目相關的生產場所，不應將其表述為IEC 62109-1/-2證書。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CB Scheme IEC 62109 reports or certificates — only where actually issued for the supplied model

gap.en: Gap: A China-only GB/T or NB/T safety file does not prove IEC 62109 compliance for Mauritania project procurement. Exporters should obtain IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test reports or CB certificates for the supplied model family, verify that the reports cover the intended ambient-temperature and enclosure ratings, and check with the importer whether any DNPQ or other national conformity filing is required. For harsh desert or coastal sites, add evidence for thermal derating, enclosure ingress protection, corrosion resistance, fire-risk controls, and maintainability.
gap.zh: 差距：仅有中国GB/T或NB/T安全文件不能证明满足毛里塔尼亚项目采购所需IEC 62109合规。出口商应取得供应型号系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验报告或CB证书，核实报告覆盖预期环境温度和外壳等级，并与进口商确认是否需要DNPQ或其他国家合格评定申报。对于严酷沙漠或沿海场址，应增加热降额、外壳防护、耐腐蚀、消防风险控制和可维护性证据。
gap.zht: 差距：僅有中國GB/T或NB/T安全文件不能證明滿足茅利塔尼亞項目採購所需IEC 62109合規。出口商應取得供應型號系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗報告或CB證書，核實報告覆蓋預期環境溫度和外殼等級，並與進口商確認是否需要DNPQ或其他國家合格評定申報。對於嚴酷沙漠或沿海場址，應增加熱降額、外殼防護、耐腐蝕、消防風險控制和可維護性證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required by tender, SOMELEC connection review, ARE/public-service approval, importer conformity filing, or lender specification; a standalone public Mauritania IEC 62109 law was not confirmed
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or procurement-driven for China domestic certification; GB/T evidence is not equivalent to IEC 62109 unless the IEC report is actually issued

source.publisher: Autorité de Régulation (ARE), République Islamique de Mauritanie

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Mauritania, build the safety file around IEC 62109-1/-2 and project-owner or lender acceptance, not China GB/T evidence alone. Confirm the DNPQ or other national conformity route with the importer and local counsel because the public official source trail was not conclusive. Add heat, dust, salt, ingress-protection, and maintainability evidence for Sahara/Sahel and coastal installations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向毛里塔尼亚时，应以IEC 62109-1/-2以及项目业主或贷款方接受为安全文件核心，而不是仅依赖中国GB/T证据。请与进口商和当地顾问确认DNPQ或其他国家合格评定路径，因为公开官方来源链条并不充分。针对撒哈拉/萨赫勒及沿海安装，应增加高温、沙尘、盐雾、防护等级和可维护性证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向茅利塔尼亞時，應以IEC 62109-1/-2以及項目業主或貸款方接受為安全文件核心，而不是僅依賴中國GB/T證據。請與進口商和當地顧問確認DNPQ或其他國家合格評定路徑，因為公開官方來源鏈條並不充分。針對撒哈拉/薩赫勒及沿海安裝，應增加高溫、沙塵、鹽霧、防護等級和可維護性證據。
